answer:
Firecrawl offers a free tier that provides 1,000 monthly credits [1][2][3]. You can access this via two methods:

Keyless mode allows you to use the official CLI, MCP server, or SDKs without an API key or account creation [2][4]. It is limited to basic scraping, searching, and interaction, with usage capped per IP address [4].

The Free plan requires account sign-up and an API key [3]. This provides access to all endpoints (including crawl, map, and batch scrape) and a dashboard to track usage [2][4]. It supports up to 2 concurrent requests [1][3].

For both options, credits reset monthly [2][3]. If you exceed your limit, you can upgrade to paid subscription tiers starting at $16/month [3].

results.title: Introducing Firecrawl Keyless: Search, scrape, and interact without an API key
